title: fix_pipeline_decide_fix_response
description: Response schema for the fix_pipeline_decide_fix agent that decides how to deliver an already-produced code fix: as inline code suggestions on an existing merge request, as a commit to a new merge request, or — when the execution step produced no changes — by ending the flow with no further action.

decision.description: Use 'create_fix_on_existing_mr' when a merge request URL is provided AND every file changed by the execution step already appears in the merge request diff. Use 'create_fix_on_new_mr' when the execution step produced changes but they cannot be delivered as inline suggestions — either no merge request URL was provided, or the execution step changed files that are not present in the merge request diff. Use 'no_action_needed' when the execution step produced no changes (the execution diff is empty), e.g. because the merge request head already addresses the failing pipeline; the flow then ends without posting anything.

reasoning.description: 1-2 sentence justification for the chosen decision, written so it can be shown directly to the user. State what was observed (e.g. empty execution diff, file paths inside/outside the MR diff) and how that maps to the chosen decision.
